ogTitle: Augathella vs Augustine Heights: Climate Safety

heading: Augathella vs Augustine Heights — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Augathella, Queensland and Augustine Heights, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Augathella has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Augustine Heights (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Augathella or Augustine Heights safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Augathella has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Augustine Heights scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Augathella scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Augustine Heights scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Augathella or Augustine Heights?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Augathella has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.78% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
